ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "package_channel" TEXT /* Channel where the package is hosted */,
  "min_version" TEXT /* Minimum version of the package */,
  "max_version" TEXT /* Maximum version of the package */,
  "recommended_version" TEXT /* Recommended version of the package */,
  "is_subpackage" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the package is a sub-package */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the package group */,
  "provides_extension" TEXT /* Extension provided by the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the package */,
  "license" TEXT /* The license under which the package is distributed */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* The URL of the package's repository */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the package has been downloaded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the package was updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the package was created */,
  "maintainer_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who maintains the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_provides_extension FOREIGN KEY ("provides_extension") REFERENCES extensions ("extension_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_maintainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_group_name FOREIGN KEY ("group_name") REFERENCES package_groups ("group_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that has the dependency */,
  "dep_package_name" TEXT /* Name of the dependent package */,
  "dep_package_channel" TEXT /* Channel of the dependent package */,
  "min_version" TEXT /* Minimum version of the dependent package */,
  "max_version" TEXT /* Maximum version of the dependent package */,
  "recommended_version" TEXT /* Recommended version of the dependent package */,
  "is_subpackage" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the dependent package is a sub-package */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the package group */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Specifies the type of dependency (e.g., required, optional) */,
  "is_dev_dependency" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the dependency is for development purposes */,
  "dependency_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the dependency */,
  "dependency_license" TEXT /* The license of the dependent package */,
  "dependency_repository_url" TEXT /* The URL of the dependent package's repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conflicts" (
  "conflict_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conflict */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that has the conflict */,
  "conflict_package_name" TEXT /* Name of the conflicting package */,
  "conflict_package_channel" TEXT /* Channel of the conflicting package */,
  "conflict_type" TEXT /* Specifies the type of conflict (e.g., version conflict, dependency conflict) */,
  "conflict_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the conflict */,
  "conflict_resolution" TEXT /* Suggested resolution for the conflict */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conflict_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflicts_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the package group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The last time the group was updated */,
  "maintainer_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who maintains the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_groups_maintainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extensions" (
  "extension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package extension */,
  "extension_name" TEXT /* Name of the package extension */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package extension */,
  "license" TEXT /* The license under which the extension is distributed */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* The URL of the extension's repository */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the extension has been downloaded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the extension was updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the extension was created */,
  "maintainer_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who maintains the extension */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("extension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extensions_maintainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin, auditor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last time the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The last time the user account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the user group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The last time the group was updated */,
  "maintainer_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who maintains the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_groups_maintainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the package */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., install, update, view) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the client performing the action */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
